descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes win first BCJHL championship in eight years, sweep Kelowna 3-2 in final game.
descriptionLong: Orland Kurtenbach's Richmond Sockeyes captured their first BC Junior Hockey League championship in eight years on March 25, 1987, defeating the Kelowna Packers 3-2 at Richmond Arena to sweep the best-of-nine final series five games to none. The Sockeyes achieved 13 consecutive wins through three playoff series. Captain Trevor Dickie and teammates celebrated the victory, with plans to pursue the Centennial Cup national championship.
